draft:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Patel as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of cybersecurity. As a seasoned professional with over two decades of experience in the technology and cybersecurity sectors, I have had the opportunity to work with and observe many talented individuals. However, Mr. Patel's exceptional skills, innovative contributions, and profound impact on the industry truly set him apart as an individual of extraordinary ability.

To provide some background, I am the President of the Cloud Safety Consortium (CSC) Southern Branch, a role I have held since 2018. In this capacity, I lead the board in promoting best practices for security assurance in cloud computing and provide education on the secure use of cloud computing. The CSC is a globally recognized organization dedicated to defining and raising awareness of best practices to help ensure a secure cloud computing environment. Through my leadership at the CSC, I have had the opportunity to work closely with industry leaders, government agencies, and academic institutions to advance cloud security practices.

In addition to my role at the CSC, I have held several executive positions in major technology firms. Most recently, I served as the Chief Revenue Officer at Streamline Innovations, where I focused on cloud, security, and connectivity solutions. Prior to that, I was the Global Strategic Services Leader at Innovate Solutions, where I led the innovation and incubation team, focusing on strategic cloud and platform partnerships. Earlier in my career, I established and led the Cloud Security Organization at Innovate Solutions, managing product lines and partnerships with all major cloud providers and security platform vendors, and growing the business by 100% year-over-year.

Throughout my career, I have worked with Fortune 100 companies, the Department of Defense, Aeronautics United, and various startups across multiple sectors, including software, technology, aerospace, defense, transportation, logistics, finance, healthcare, and retail. This diverse experience has given me a deep understanding of security and technology across various fields and has allowed me to develop a keen eye for identifying extraordinary talent in the industry.

It is through my role as the President of the Cloud Safety Consortium (CSC) Southern Branch that I had the privilege of becoming acquainted with Mr. Rohan Patel and his groundbreaking work in the field of cybersecurity. The CSC is a globally recognized organization dedicated to defining and raising awareness of best practices to help ensure a secure cloud computing environment. Through our various initiatives, events, and collaborations with industry leaders, government agencies, and academic institutions, the CSC provides a platform for professionals to share knowledge, develop new strategies, and advance cloud security practices.

Mr. Patel first came to my attention through his company, Boundless Security, which has been making significant strides in the cybersecurity space. Boundless Security's innovative approach to securing generative AI applications for enterprises has garnered attention and respect within the industry. As the President of the CSC Southern Branch, I have had the opportunity to engage with a wide range of professionals and companies working on cutting-edge technologies, and Boundless Security's work stood out for its originality and effectiveness.

My connection with Mr. Patel and Boundless Security was further solidified when I had the opportunity to evaluate their flagship product for the prestigious Foster Award. The Foster Award is presented by the Cloud Safety Consortium (CSC) Arizona Division to recognize outstanding achievements in cloud security. This award is named in honor of Lawrence Foster, a respected figure in the cybersecurity community, and is given to individuals or organizations that have demonstrated exceptional innovation, leadership, and impact in the field of cloud security. The Foster Award is a highly regarded accolade within the industry, and recipients are selected through a rigorous evaluation process conducted by a panel of experts.

Boundless Security was recognized with the Foster Award for their flagship product, which addresses the critical issue of data leakage in generative AI applications like PromptAI. Their innovative solution stood out for its ability to effectively secure sensitive data while maintaining usability and performance. This recognition highlights Boundless Security's significant contributions to the field of cloud security and their commitment to advancing best practices in protecting AI-driven technologies. The Foster Award serves as a testament to Boundless Security's leadership and impact in the cybersecurity industry, and it underscores the importance of their work in safeguarding data in the rapidly evolving landscape of AI applications.

The award was presented to Boundless Security in recognition of their flagship product, which addresses the critical issue of data leakage in generative AI applications like PromptAI. Their innovative solution effectively secures sensitive data while maintaining usability and performance, making it a standout in the field. This recognition highlights Boundless Security's significant contributions to cloud security and their commitment to advancing best practices in protecting AI-driven technologies.

The Foster Award serves as a testament to Boundless Security's leadership and impact in the cybersecurity industry, underscoring the importance of their work in safeguarding data in the rapidly evolving landscape of AI applications. As the President of the CSC Arizona Division, I had the privilege of presenting this award to Boundless Security, acknowledging their outstanding achievements and dedication to enhancing cloud security. This recognition not only celebrates Boundless Security's accomplishments but also reinforces the critical role they play in advancing the field of cybersecurity.

This recognition highlights Boundless Security's significant contributions to the field of cloud security and their commitment to advancing best practices in protecting AI-driven technologies. The Foster Award serves as a testament to Boundless Security's leadership and impact in the cybersecurity industry, underscoring the importance of their work in safeguarding data in the rapidly evolving landscape of AI applications.

As the President of the CSC Arizona Division, I had the privilege of presenting this award to Boundless Security, acknowledging their outstanding achievements and dedication to enhancing cloud security. This recognition not only celebrates Boundless Security's accomplishments but also reinforces the critical role they play in advancing the field of cybersecurity.

The Foster Award is a testament to Mr. Patel's extraordinary ability and his company's innovative approach to addressing critical security challenges in the AI space. This recognition underscores Mr. Patel's leadership and impact in the cybersecurity industry and highlights the importance of his work in safeguarding data in the rapidly evolving landscape of AI applications.

Boundless Security's flagship product, which addresses the critical issue of data leakage in generative AI applications like PromptAI, effectively secures sensitive data while maintaining usability and performance. This innovative solution stood out for its originality and effectiveness, making it a standout in the field. The Foster Award serves as a testament to Mr. Patel's leadership and impact in the cybersecurity industry, underscoring the importance of his work in safeguarding data in the rapidly evolving landscape of AI applications.

Mr. Patel's recognition with the Foster Award highlights his significant contributions to the field of cloud security and his commitment to advancing best practices in protecting AI-driven technologies. This prestigious accolade underscores Mr. Patel's leadership and impact in the cybersecurity industry, reinforcing the critical role he plays in advancing the field of cybersecurity.

In addition to the Foster Award, Mr. Patel has been recognized by several other prestigious publications for his expertise and insights in the field of cybersecurity. His commentary on managing data overload was featured in The Wall Street Journal, where he discussed the importance of a centralized data team in making sense of disparate data. This recognition from a leading business publication underscores Mr. Patel's authority and thought leadership in the technology sector.

Furthermore, Mr. Patel was featured in the Cyber Ventures blog as part of the "Alto Networks Alumni," which highlights talented founders from Alto Networks and the security companies they have established. This feature places him alongside top cybersecurity CEOs and underscores his influence and reputation within the industry. Cyber Ventures is a well-regarded newsletter with over 16,000 active subscribers, further amplifying Mr. Patel's reach and impact.

Mr. Patel's insights were also included in the Secure Leadership Series newsletter and podcast, where he was featured alongside other notable figures such as the Chairman of Starsafe, the CISO of Denims & Co., and the CEO of VisionGuard. The Secure Leadership Series has a high-profile audience of over 30,000 members, including more than 1,900 CXO members and 3,165 director-level and above members. This platform provided Mr. Patel with a significant opportunity to share his knowledge and expertise with a wide and influential audience.

These recognitions from The Wall Street Journal, Cyber Ventures, and the Secure Leadership Series highlight Mr. Patel's standing as a thought leader and innovator in the cybersecurity field. His ability to contribute valuable insights across multiple respected platforms underscores his expertise and influence in the industry. These accolades, in addition to the Foster Award, collectively demonstrate Mr. Patel's extraordinary ability and his significant contributions to advancing cybersecurity practices.

In addition to these accolades, Mr. Patel has made significant contributions to the cybersecurity industry through his role as Co-Founder and CEO of Boundless Security. Boundless Security has raised nearly $4 million in seed funding from top-tier investors, including Seed Forge, Velocity Partners, and other angel investors. This funding underscores the confidence that the investment community has in Mr. Patel's vision and the potential of Boundless Security's innovative solutions.

Boundless Security's flagship product, which addresses the critical issue of data leakage in generative AI applications like PromptAI, has been adopted by multiple top American enterprises working with sensitive data. This widespread adoption highlights the effectiveness and value of Boundless Security's solutions in addressing real-world security challenges faced by leading organizations.

Under Mr. Patel's leadership, Boundless Security has not only developed cutting-edge technology but has also built strong relationships with key industry stakeholders. The company's ability to attract significant investment and gain traction with major enterprises is a testament to Mr. Patel's extraordinary ability to drive innovation and deliver impactful results in the cybersecurity space.

Furthermore, Mr. Patel's previous experience at Alto Networks and Safeguard Ltd. has equipped him with deep domain expertise and a strong foundation in building and scaling security products. His background in product management and engineering, combined with his entrepreneurial spirit, has enabled him to lead Boundless Security to achieve remarkable success in a highly competitive industry.

In conclusion, Mr. Rohan Patel's extraordinary ability in the field of cybersecurity is evident through his numerous accolades, his leadership at Boundless Security, and his impactful contributions to the industry. His recognition by prestigious publications such as The Wall Street Journal, Cyber Ventures, and the Secure Leadership Series underscores his standing as a thought leader and innovator. The Foster Award, presented by the Cloud Safety Consortium, further highlights his significant contributions to cloud security and his commitment to advancing best practices in protecting AI-driven technologies.

Under Mr. Patel's leadership, Boundless Security has achieved remarkable success, raising significant funding from top-tier investors and gaining widespread adoption among major American enterprises. His ability to drive innovation and deliver impactful solutions in the cybersecurity space is a testament to his vision, expertise, and dedication.

Mr. Patel's background in product management and engineering, combined with his entrepreneurial spirit, has equipped him with the skills and experience necessary to lead Boundless Security to new heights. His deep domain expertise, honed through his previous roles at Alto Networks and Safeguard Ltd., has been instrumental in the company's success.

In summary, Mr. Rohan Patel's extraordinary ability, leadership, and contributions to the cybersecurity industry make him a highly deserving recipient of recognition. His work at Boundless Security and his influence across the broader cybersecurity community demonstrate his commitment to advancing the field and safeguarding critical technologies. It is without hesitation that I provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Patel, confident in his continued impact and success in the cybersecurity industry.

Sincerely,

Alex Thompson
President
Cloud Safety Consortium, Southern Branch

Dear Sir or Madam:

 I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Rohan Patel as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of cybersecurity. As a seasoned professional with over two decades of experience in the technology and cybersecurity sectors, I have had the opportunity to work with and observe many talented individuals. However, Mr. Patel's remarkable skills, innovative contributions, and profound impact on the industry truly set him apart as an individual of extraordinary ability.

 As far as my background, I am the President of the Cloud Safety Consortium (CSC) Southern Branch, a role I have held since 2018. In this capacity, I lead the board in promoting best practices for security assurance in cloud computing and provide education on the secure use of cloud computing. The CSC is a globally recognized organization dedicated to defining and raising awareness of best practices to help ensure a secure cloud computing environment. Through my leadership at the CSC, I have had the opportunity to work closely with industry leaders, government agencies, and academic institutions to advance cloud security practices.

 In addition to my role at the CSC, I have held several executive positions in major technology firms. Most recently, I served as the Chief Revenue Officer at Streamline Innovations, where I focused on cloud, security, and connectivity solutions. Prior to that, I was the Global Strategic Services Leader at Innovate Solutions, where I led the innovation and incubation team, focusing on strategic cloud and platform partnerships. Earlier in my career, I established and led the Cloud Security Organization at Innovate Solutions, managing product lines and partnerships with all major cloud providers and security platform vendors, and growing the business by 100% year-over-year.

	Through my role as President of the Cloud Safety Consortium (CSC) Southern Branch, I had the privilege of becoming acquainted with Mr. Patel and his groundbreaking work in the field of cybersecurity. His company, Boundless Security, has been making significant strides in securing generative AI applications for enterprises, garnering attention and respect within the industry. Having engaged with a wide range of professionals and companies working on cutting-edge technologies, I found Boundless Security's innovative approach stood out for its originality and effectiveness.

 I had the opportunity to evaluate Boundless Security's flagship product for the prestigious CSC Foster Award. The Foster Award is presented by the Cloud Safety Consortium (CSC) Arizona Division to recognize outstanding achievements in cloud security. The Foster Award is a highly regarded accolade within the industry, and recipients are selected through a rigorous evaluation process conducted by a panel of experts.

	Mr. Patel, as the CEO and Co-Founder of Boundless Security, played a pivotal role in the creation of a flagship product that has set a new benchmark for protecting sensitive data in generative AI applications. His vision and leadership were instrumental in developing a solution that not only meets the complex challenges of AI security but also provides outstanding usability and effectiveness. By integrating cutting-edge technologies and innovative strategies, Mr. Patel enabled enterprises to enhance their data protection with confidence and efficiency. His efforts led to the product's widespread adoption by multiple top American enterprises, effectively addressing real-world security challenges faced by leading organizations.

	Beyond product development, Mr. Patel's accomplishments extend into building strong relationships with key industry stakeholders and attracting significant investment. Under his leadership, Boundless Security raised nearly $4 million in seed funding from prestigious investors, including Seed Forge, Velocity Partners, and other angel investors. This influx of investment underscores the confidence the investment community has in Mr. Patel's vision and the potential of his innovative solutions. His ability to drive innovation and deliver impactful results in the cybersecurity space is a testament to his extraordinary leadership and foresight.

	These remarkable achievements led to Mr. Patel and Boundless Security being honored with the Foster Award, recognizing their flagship product's success in tackling data leakage issues in generative AI applications like PromptAI. The solution's ability to secure sensitive information while maintaining usability and performance earned them this prestigious accolade. The Foster Award underscores Mr. Patel's significant contributions to the field of cloud security and reaffirms his commitment to advancing best practices in AI-driven technologies. This recognition stands as a testament to Mr. Patel's leadership and Boundless Security's impact within the cybersecurity industry, highlighting the crucial importance of their work in a rapidly evolving AI landscape.

In addition to the Foster Award, Mr. Patel has been recognized by several other prestigious publications for his expertise and insights in the field of cybersecurity. His commentary on managing data overload was featured in The Wall Street Journal, where he discussed the importance of a centralized data team in making sense of disparate data. This recognition from a leading business publication underscores Mr. Patel's authority and thought leadership in the technology sector.

	Furthermore, Mr. Patel was featured in the Cyber Ventures blog as part of the "Alto Networks Alumni," a recognition of talented founders who have emerged from Alto Networks to establish impactful security companies. During his tenure at Alto Networks, Mr. Patel played a critical role as a Senior Product Manager, where he was the driving force behind the Data Loss Prevention (DLP) product, significantly enhancing its business value and supporting top enterprise and government clients in achieving enhanced security outcomes. His strategic vision and ability to integrate new technologies were pivotal in this success. This feature in the blog places him alongside top cybersecurity CEOs, highlighting his influence and esteemed reputation within the industry. With over 16,000 active subscribers, the well-regarded Cyber Ventures newsletter further amplifies Mr. Patel's reach and impact.

 To summarize, Mr. Patel's extraordinary ability in the field of cybersecurity is evident through his numerous accolades, his leadership at Boundless Security, and his impactful contributions to the industry. His recognition by prestigious publications such as The Wall Street Journal and Cyber Ventures underscores his standing as a thought leader and innovator. The Foster Award, presented by the Cloud Safety Consortium, further highlights his significant contributions to cloud security and his commitment to advancing best practices in protecting AI-driven technologies.

 Under Mr. Patel's leadership, Boundless Security has achieved remarkable success, raising significant funding from top-tier investors and gaining widespread adoption among major American enterprises. His ability to drive innovation and deliver impactful solutions in the cybersecurity space is a testament to his vision, expertise, and dedication.It is without hesitation that I provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Patel, confident in his continued impact and success in the cybersecurity industry.

Sincerely,


Alex Thompson 
President
Cloud Safety Consortium, Southern Branch
